source_policy: Derived READ-ONLY from C:\SW_MUSH\data\weapons.yaml and C:\SW_MUSH\docs\design\Guide_01_WEG_D6_Core_Mechanics.md. SW_MUSH is strictly read-only reference; this file is the authoritative project-owned copy. Data flows one way: out of SW_MUSH into data/.
source_note: Ported 2026-06-24 from sw_mush weapons.yaml. Curated subset: Clone Wars-era (20 BBY Mos Eisley) only. Excluded: Heavy Repeating Blaster (E-Web — Imperial doctrine framing). Stormtrooper armor included in armor file only. Faction-issued weapons (dc17, dc15a, e5, officers_sidearm, concealed_blaster) are Clone Wars-era and included with vendor_stocked:false. Contraband weapons retained — they exist in-universe in Clone Wars era. Damage as WEG D6 XD/XD+y pool strings. Ranges in meters [short_min, short_max, medium_max, long_max]. Melee damage uses STR+bonus convention. Range difficulties: point-blank(<short_min)=VE(5), short=E(10), medium=M(15), long=D(20).

hold_out_blaster.name: Hold-Out Blaster
hold_out_blaster.notes: Easily concealed. Illegal or regulated in most systems.

stun_pistol.name: Stun Pistol
stun_pistol.notes: A dedicated stun sidearm. Favored by bail agents and bouncers who need targets breathing.

blaster_carbine.name: Blaster Carbine
blaster_carbine.notes: Rifle punch in a shorter frame; restricted in most systems.

heavy_blaster_pistol.name: Heavy Blaster Pistol
heavy_blaster_pistol.notes: Powerful but shorter range than standard pistols.

sporting_blaster.name: Sporting Blaster
sporting_blaster.notes: Light civilian blaster, common on frontier worlds.

light_repeating_blaster.name: Light Repeating Blaster
light_repeating_blaster.notes: Infantry support weapon. No stun setting.

sporting_blaster_rifle.name: Sporting Blaster Rifle
sporting_blaster_rifle.notes: Hunting rifle. +1D bonus with scope after 1 round aiming.

bowcaster.name: Bowcaster
bowcaster.notes: Wookiee weapon. Requires STR 4D to cock without assistance.

dc17_pistol.name: DC-17 Hand Blaster
dc17_pistol.notes: Republic-issue clone trooper sidearm. Compact, reliable — the standard clone pistol. Faction-issued only; not for sale.

dc15_blaster_rifle.name: DC-15A Blaster Rifle
dc15_blaster_rifle.notes: Standard Republic clone trooper longarm. Extended range for open-field engagements. Faction-issued only.

officers_sidearm.name: Officer's Blaster Pistol
officers_sidearm.notes: DL-44 variant issued to senior officers. Heavy-pistol stopping power in a sidearm frame. Faction-issued only.

e5_blaster_rifle.name: E-5 Blaster Rifle
e5_blaster_rifle.notes: Standard CIS battle rifle, issued to droid infantry and organic CIS operatives. No stun setting. Faction-issued only.

concealed_blaster.name: Concealed Blaster
concealed_blaster.notes: Palm-sized holdout blaster, standard kit for intelligence operatives. Chain-reward only; not for open sale.

heavy_blaster_pistol_t6.name: Heavy Blaster Pistol (Thunderer-pattern)
heavy_blaster_pistol_t6.notes: BlasTech T-6 pattern — hardest-hitting heavy pistol on the lawful market. No stun setting.

blaster_pistol_dl22.name: Blaster Pistol (DL-22)
blaster_pistol_dl22.notes: BlasTech DL-22 — a half-pip hotter than the standard pattern; otherwise the same dependable sidearm.

heavy_blaster_pistol_dl6h.name: Heavy Blaster Pistol (DL-6H)
heavy_blaster_pistol_dl6h.notes: BlasTech DL-6H — a heavy that keeps standard-pistol range.

sniper_rifle_x45.name: Sniper Rifle (X-45)
sniper_rifle_x45.notes: SoroSuub X-45 — integral scope steadies long-range work.

disruptor_pistol.name: Disruptor Pistol
disruptor_pistol.notes: Banned on every world with a functioning court. Possession alone is an infraction; patrols confiscate on sight.

force_pike.name: Force Pike
force_pike.notes: Energy polearm favored by ceremonial and elite guards.

gaderffii.name: Gaderffii (Gaffi Stick)
gaderffii.notes: Tusken Raider weapon. Clone Wars-era Tatooine locals know this weapon well.

vibrodagger_talon.name: Vibrodagger (Talon-pattern)
vibrodagger_talon.notes: LaserHone Talon — ultrasonic edge, near-silent. The fringe's favorite boot knife.

vibrorapier_duelist.name: Vibrorapier (Duelist-pattern)
vibrorapier_duelist.notes: LaserHone Duelist — ultrasonic edge, near-silent. A boarding-action favorite.

lightsaber.name: Lightsaber
lightsaber.notes: If attacker misses difficulty by 10+, hits self with full damage. Requires Force sensitivity. Cannot be purchased.

stun_grenade.name: Stun Grenade
stun_grenade.notes: Merr-Sonn riot pattern — rechargeable and reusable. Stun-only by design.

autocaster_drolan.name: Auto-caster
autocaster_drolan.notes: Drolan Plasteel repeating crossbow — auto-loads the next quarrel. Silent, cheap to feed, beats energy scanners.
